text:
2. **Replace with per-server wildcards** to actually get the auto-allow you wanted, e.g.:
   - `mcp__plugin_vercel_vercel__*`
   - `mcp__claude_ai_Gmail__*`, `mcp__claude_ai_Google_Calendar__*`, `mcp__claude_ai_Google_Drive__*`

   Downside: you'd need to add a new entry whenever you connect a new MCP server. [...] That was the only issue `/doctor` reported. The fix clears the warning with no behavior change — the rule was already being skipped, so MCP tools were prompting per-use before and will continue to. If you later want to auto-allow specific MCP servers, the supported form is per-server: `mcp__<server>__*`.
